Fe2O3.source: Blake R. L.; Hessevick R. E.; Zoltai T.; Finger L. W. Refinement of the hematite structure. American Mineralogist 51, 123-129 (1966). https://rruff.geo.arizona.edu/doclib/am/vol51/AM51_123.pdf | COD 9000139: https://www.crystallography.net/cod/9000139.html
Fe2O3.notes: Hematite alpha-Fe2O3. COD reports a=5.038 A, c=13.772 A, V=302.722 A3, Z=6, diffraction density=5.256 g/cm3. App density is calculated from Z*M/(N_A*V).

TiO2.source: Howard C. J.; Sabine T. M.; Dickson F. Structural and thermal parameters for rutile and anatase. Acta Crystallographica B 47, 462-468 (1991). https://doi.org/10.1107/S010876819100335X | COD 9015662: https://www.crystallography.net/cod/9015662.html
TiO2.notes: Rutile TiO2. COD reports a=4.5937 A, c=2.9587 A, V=62.435 A3, Z=2, diffraction density=4.249 g/cm3. App density is calculated from Z*M/(N_A*V).

ZnO.source: Schreyer M.; Guo L.; Thirunahari S.; Gao F.; Garland M. Simultaneous determination of several crystal structures from powder mixtures. Journal of Applied Crystallography 47, 659-667 (2014). https://doi.org/10.1107/S1600576714003379 | COD 2300450: https://www.crystallography.net/cod/2300450.html
ZnO.notes: Zincite ZnO. COD reports a=3.249308 A, c=5.205709 A, V=47.5984 A3, Z=2, diffraction density=5.67848 g/cm3. App density is calculated from Z*M/(N_A*V).

ZrO2.source: Smith D. K.; Newkirk H. W. The crystal structure of baddeleyite (monoclinic ZrO2) and its relation to the polymorphism of ZrO2. Acta Crystallographica 18, 983-991 (1965). https://doi.org/10.1107/S0365110X65002402 | COD 9007485: https://www.crystallography.net/cod/9007485.html
ZrO2.notes: Baddeleyite monoclinic ZrO2. COD reports a=5.145 A, b=5.2075 A, c=5.3107 A, beta=99.23 deg, V=140.445 A3, Z=4, diffraction density=5.828 g/cm3. App density is calculated from Z*M/(N_A*V).

Co3O4.source: Kotousova I. S.; Polyakov S. M. Electron-diffraction study of Co3O4. Kristallografiya 17, 661-663 (1972). COD 1526734: https://www.crystallography.net/cod/1526734.html
Co3O4.notes: Spinel Co3O4. COD reports a=8.065 A, V=524.582 A3, Z=8. No DOI/diffraction-density field was present in the COD entry; app density is calculated from Z*M/(N_A*V).
